ruling: the matter was not argued. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PETITIONER HITACHI GLOBAL STORAGE TECHNOLOGIES, INC'S Motion For Determination Of No Prevailing Party, Or, In The Alternative, For Award Of Attorneys' Fees. Granted. Plaintiff is entitled to recover all of its claimed fees pursuant to Civil Code 1717. (Prevailing party to prepare a form of order.) Notice Of Motion And Motion To Amend Judgemnt To Include Signature Homes, Inc. As Judgement Debtors
Off Calendar Feb-16-2012 Continued To Mar-13-12 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Douglas P. Drayton, Esq., of Bunting, Drayton & Alward LLP, Tel. 415.617.0244, appearing for Plaintiff and moving party.
David J. Millstein, Esq., of Millstein & Associates, Tel. 415.348.0348, appearing for Defendant and opposing party James Ghielmetti.
Richard J. Idell, Esq., of Idell & Seitel LLP, Tel. 415.986.2400

RULING: A R G U E D. The court vacated its tentative ruling and ruled as follows: PETITIONER HITACHI GLOBAL STORAGE TECHNOLOGIES, INC.'s Motion To Amend Judgemnt To Include Signature Homes, Inc. As Judgement Debtors is continued to March 13, 2012 and deemed submitted on that day. Mr. Drayton and Mr. Millstein to prepare statements of decision and to provide them to the parties & to the court no later than 2/27/2012. Objections due on 3/02/12; response to objections due on 3/6. Parties to meet and confer thereafter and submit the result by 3/13. Judge: Harold Kahn, Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR #7077
